params.name: Parker Solar Probe
params.description:
On Aug 12, 2018 AD, the Parker Solar Probe was launched with the mission of observing the sun.
The Parker Solar Probe is named after Professor Parker, a pioneer in solar wind research. It is the first spacecraft to enter the low solar corona. The spacecraft, which is protected by a reinforced carbon-carbon composite, can withstand temperatures of nearly 1400 degrees. The probe's numerous observational tools have collected a large amount of valuable data, which has advanced our understanding o …
